---
title: "Cavan Donohoe - Data Scientist"
output:
  html_document:
    includes:
      in_header: header/header.html
      after_body: include_footer.html
---

```{r structured-data, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
# Add structured data (JSON-LD) for better SEO
cat('
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Person",
  "name": "Cavan Donohoe",
  "jobTitle": "Data Scientist",
  "url": "https://cavandonohoe.github.io",
  "sameAs": [
    "https://github.com/cavandonohoe",
    "https://www.linkedin.com/in/cavan-donohoe/",
    "https://www.instagram.com/cavandonohoe",
    "https://www.facebook.com/cavandonohoe"
  ],
  "email": "cavandonohoe@gmail.com",
  "description": "Data Scientist passionate about making workflows easier through automation and reproducible analysis."
}
</script>
')
```

## Hi, I’m Cavan 👋

I’m a **Data Scientist** focused on turning messy data into clear decisions through automation, reproducible analysis, and polished storytelling.

<div class="hero-cta">
  <a class="hero-btn" href="cv.pdf">View Resume</a>
  <a class="hero-btn" href="#projects">Explore Projects</a>
  <a class="hero-btn" href="mailto:cavandonohoe@gmail.com">Contact Me</a>
</div>

![Sunset at China Walls on Oahu, Hawaii - Reminiscing of my life on Oahu](images/China Walls Sunset.jpg)

My work ranges from housing market intelligence and finance calculators to entertainment analytics and educational R content.

Check out my latest project: a [Rent vs. Buy Calculator](https://cavandonohoe.shinyapps.io/rent-vs-buy/) — an interactive Shiny app that runs a side-by-side financial simulation to help you decide whether to buy a home or keep renting and investing. Source code on [GitHub](https://github.com/cavandonohoe/rent-vs-buy).

## Featured Project Template

Use this structure for every featured write-up:

1. **Problem**: What decision or question does this solve?
2. **Data**: Source, size, and freshness of the dataset.
3. **Method**: Models, assumptions, and workflow.
4. **Result**: 2–3 quantified outcomes.
5. **Reproducibility**: Link to source code and app/report.

## Projects {#projects}

```{r project-cards, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
cards <- data.frame(
  href = c(
    "us_rental_markets.html",
    "la_real_estate.html",
    "https://cavandonohoe.shinyapps.io/rent-vs-buy/",
    "imdb_top_250_tv_series.html",
    "best_picture_nominees.html",
    "top_250_imdb_with_rt.html",
    "imdb_rating_plot.html",
    "avca_all_americans.html",
    "firefighter_schedule.html",
    "google_maps_saved_places.html",
    "my_imdb.html",
    "my_travels.html",
    "best_pic_vs_top_1000.html",
    "sierpinski_triangle.html",
    "confederate_statues.html",
    "learn_r.html"
  ),
  icon = c(
    "🏘️","🏡","🧮","📺","🎬","🍿","📈","🏐","🚒","📍","⭐","✈️","🎞️","🔺","🗽","📚"
  ),
  title = c(
    "US Rental Investment Markets",
    "LA Neighborhoods: Price per Sq Ft",
    "Rent vs. Buy Calculator",
    "IMDb Top 250 TV Series",
    "Best Picture Nominees",
    "Top 250 IMDb + Rotten Tomatoes",
    "IMDb Rating Plot",
    "AVCA Volleyball All-Americans",
    "Firefighter Schedule",
    "Google Maps Saved Places",
    "My IMDb Ratings",
    "Get Bloggy With It",
    "Best Picture vs Top 1000 Box Office",
    "Sierpinski Triangle",
    "Confederate Statues Timeline",
    "Learn R"
  ),
  description = c(
    "Cap rates, vacancy, and demand signals for 3,800+ cities using Zillow and Census data.",
    "Zillow + Redfin data for LA neighborhoods — median prices, rent, and what $1M buys you.",
    "Interactive Shiny app for side-by-side financial simulation of renting vs. buying.",
    "Scraped ratings, seasons, and trends for the top 250 TV shows on IMDb.",
    "Oscar Best Picture data — distributors, producers, and historical nominee analysis.",
    "Cross-referencing IMDb's top 250 movies with Rotten Tomatoes scores.",
    "Interactive episode-by-episode rating visualization for any TV series.",
    "Web-scraped history of men's volleyball All-American selections and champions.",
    "Shift calendar generator for firefighter 48/96 schedules.",
    "My 'Want to Go' and 'Favorites' lists exported and visualized.",
    "Personal movie ratings and watchlist from my IMDb account.",
    "Travel blog entries from my adventures around the world.",
    "Do Oscar winners also dominate the box office? An interactive comparison.",
    "Fractal geometry generated in R — the classic chaos game visualization.",
    "When were Confederate monuments erected? A data-driven look at the timeline.",
    "Tutorial series: intro, data manipulation, visualization, and statistics in R."
  ),
  tags = c(
    "real-estate,finance",
    "real-estate,finance",
    "finance,tools",
    "entertainment",
    "entertainment",
    "entertainment",
    "entertainment,tools",
    "sports,scraping",
    "tools",
    "maps,travel",
    "entertainment",
    "travel,blog",
    "entertainment,finance",
    "education,visualization",
    "history,visualization",
    "education"
  ),
  project_type = c(
    "analysis","analysis","app","analysis","analysis","analysis","app","analysis","tool","analysis","analysis","blog","analysis","analysis","analysis","tutorial"
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

all_tags <- unique(unlist(strsplit(cards$tags, ",")))
all_tags <- sort(trimws(all_tags))

controls <- '<div class="project-controls">'
controls <- paste0(controls, '<input id="project-search" type="search" placeholder="Search projects..." aria-label="Search projects">')
controls <- paste0(controls, '<select id="project-type" aria-label="Filter by project type"><option value="all">All Types</option><option value="analysis">Analysis</option><option value="app">App</option><option value="tool">Tool</option><option value="blog">Blog</option><option value="tutorial">Tutorial</option></select>')
controls <- paste0(controls, '<div class="project-filter-buttons">')
controls <- paste0(controls, '<button class="filter-btn active" data-tag="all">All</button>')
for (tag in all_tags) {
  controls <- paste0(controls, sprintf('<button class="filter-btn" data-tag="%s">%s</button>', tag, gsub("-", " ", tools::toTitleCase(tag))))
}
controls <- paste0(controls, '</div></div>')

html <- paste0(controls, '<div class="project-grid" id="project-grid">')
for (i in seq_len(nrow(cards))) {
  tag_label <- gsub(",", " • ", cards$tags[i])
  html <- paste0(html, sprintf(
    '<a class="project-card" href="%s" data-tags="%s" data-type="%s" data-title="%s" data-desc="%s"><div class="card-icon">%s</div><h3>%s</h3><p>%s</p><div class="project-meta">%s • %s</div></a>',
    cards$href[i], cards$tags[i], cards$project_type[i], tolower(cards$title[i]), tolower(cards$description[i]), cards$icon[i], cards$title[i], cards$description[i], cards$project_type[i], tag_label
  ))
}
html <- paste0(html, '</div>')
html <- paste0(html, '<p id="project-empty-state" class="project-empty-state" style="display:none;">No projects match your current filters.</p>')

html <- paste0(html, '
<script>
(function () {
  var activeTag = "all";
  var searchInput = document.getElementById("project-search");
  var typeInput = document.getElementById("project-type");
  var buttons = document.querySelectorAll(".filter-btn");
  var cards = document.querySelectorAll("#project-grid .project-card");
  var emptyState = document.getElementById("project-empty-state");

  function applyFilters() {
    var query = (searchInput.value || "").toLowerCase().trim();
    var activeType = typeInput.value || "all";
    var visibleCount = 0;

    cards.forEach(function(card) {
      var tags = card.getAttribute("data-tags") || "";
      var cardType = card.getAttribute("data-type") || "";
      var haystack = (card.getAttribute("data-title") + " " + card.getAttribute("data-desc") + " " + tags).toLowerCase();
      var tagMatch = activeTag === "all" || tags.split(",").indexOf(activeTag) >= 0;
      var typeMatch = activeType === "all" || cardType === activeType;
      var searchMatch = !query || haystack.indexOf(query) >= 0;
      var visible = tagMatch && typeMatch && searchMatch;
      card.style.display = visible ? "block" : "none";
      if (visible) visibleCount += 1;
    });
    emptyState.style.display = visibleCount === 0 ? "block" : "none";
  }

  buttons.forEach(function(btn) {
    btn.addEventListener("click", function() {
      buttons.forEach(function(b) { b.classList.remove("active"); });
      btn.classList.add("active");
      activeTag = btn.getAttribute("data-tag");
      applyFilters();
    });
  });

  searchInput.addEventListener("input", applyFilters);
  typeInput.addEventListener("change", applyFilters);
  applyFilters();
})();
</script>')

cat(html)
```
